Back

New split

Create your group

Start with a group name, add the people sharing costs, and VaraSplit will keep addresses ready for on-chain payments.

Step 1

Connect wallet

Step 2

Add friends

Step 3

Create group

Step 1

Start with a group name

This is the name your friends will recognize when they open the group.

Connect your wallet first. VaraSplit only asks you to sign when you create or close a record.

Keep it simple, like “Goa trip” or “Flatmates”.

Ready check

Connect your wallet first. Add at least one other member.

Step 2

Add your group members

Each person needs a friendly name and a Vara wallet address.

Names help people read the app faster.

They are saved locally for display only. Every payment, deposit, and claim still uses wallet addresses.
Waiting

Add the address when you are ready.
